page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Transdecoder identifies candidate coding regions within transcript sequences, such as those generated by de novo rna-seq transcript assembly using trinity, or constructed based on rna-seq alignments to the genome using tophat and cufflinks.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: TransDecoder identifies candidate coding regions within transcript sequences, such as those generated by de novo RNA-Seq transcript assembly using Trinity, or constructed based on RNA-Seq alignments to the genome using Tophat and Cufflinks.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: TransDecoder finds coding regions within transcripts
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: TransDecoder identifies candidate coding regions within transcript sequences, such as those generated by de novo RNA-Seq transcript assembly using Trinity, or constructed based on RNA-Seq alignments to the genome using Tophat and Cufflinks.
